content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — description.txt claims "Built-in ad blocker" and "AI-powered suggestions" (fastlane/metadata/en-US/description.txt:1-3), but the only code (App/ContentView.swift) is a plain SwiftUI task list with no content-blocker extension, no ML/CoreML imports, and no browsing feature at all.
Pierre: Apple rejects apps under 2.1/2.3.1 when marketing copy promises features the binary doesn't deliver — reviewers will look for the ad blocker and AI suggestions and find neither. The entire codebase is a ~20-line in-memory task list; even the "works fully offline" claim is trivially true only because nothing is implemented. Remove or soften the ad-blocker and AI claims, or implement and demonstrate those features before submission.
